title: anthurium umbricola
intro: Anthurium umbricola, also known as the forest anthurium, is a species of flowering plant in the Arum family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Amazonian region, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Anthurium umbricola include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to have various health benefits when used in moderation.
